summary: Iteration 12 bugfix verification on PerkWorth preview URL. BOTH iteration_11 bugs are CONFIRMED FIXED end-to-end via Playwright + network inspection. Bug #1: Edit voucher now correctly issues PATCH /api/vouchers/<id> (no POST), card count delta=0, owner change persists, save button label='Update'. Bug #2: Closing an Edit sheet via the X (data-testid='add-sheet-close') and tapping 'Add new' now opens a clean sheet titled 'Add Voucher' with empty brand/title and the Self owner chip highlighted. Regressions on Add-new (POST flow), Household Wallet Summary, and Owner Filter Row are all intact. Membership edit could not be exercised because the test account still has 0 memberships — recommend main agent seed one to validate (code path is shared so the fix should apply transparently).
tests_executed_and_verified: Login (test@perkorbit.app / Perk@1234) + PIN set (1234 x2 due to fresh container session) → home loaded
REGRESSION PASS: [data-testid='household-summary'] visible on home for 2+ owner household
REGRESSION PASS: [data-testid='owner-filter-row'] visible on MyCoupons screen

BUG#1 PASS: Clicked pencil on first voucher → Edit Voucher sheet opened with brand='Croma', current owner chip = owner-chip-father-in-law, save label='Update'. Changed owner to Father, clicked Update → exactly 1 PATCH call to /api/vouchers/6a368f47187511d979c52931 (and a follow-up GET for refresh). ZERO POSTs. Card count went from 4 → 4 (delta=0, no duplicate created). Title was 'Edit Voucher' throughout.

BUG#2 PASS: Re-opened edit on the same Croma voucher → brand prefilled='Croma'. Clicked [data-testid='add-sheet-close'] (the X) → sheet closed. Clicked [data-testid='add-coupon'] (Add new) → sheet reopened with title='Add Voucher' (is_add=True, is_edit=False), brand='' (empty), title='' (empty), [data-testid='owner-chip-self'] has bg-emerald-800 (Self default highlighted). Save button label='Save voucher'.

REGRESSION PASS: Filled new voucher (TEST_RegB12 / TEST_iter12_v2 / code=ITER12V2 / value=20) → clicked Save voucher → exactly 1 POST /api/vouchers (no PATCH). Voucher created successfully (memberships tab on next navigation shows 'Nothing here yet' for memberships, vouchers tab now has 5).

Membership edit NOT TESTED — the test account has zero membership records. Recommend seeding one via Add → Membership type to verify the same PATCH branch applies (the code path is shared with vouchers per AddVoucherSheet.handleSave line 286-295).

code_review_confirmation: AddVoucherSheet.jsx:286-295 — isEditMode branch present; PATCH via Vouchers.update(editing.id, patchBody) with user_pin/type stripped; correct toast text ('Voucher updated' / 'Membership updated')
AddVoucherSheet.jsx:234-257 — useEffect now resets unconditionally when !editing (no !open guard); prefills when editing is truthy
App.jsx:329 — <AddVoucherSheet key={editingVoucher?.id || 'new'} ... /> ensures clean remount between edit and add modes

minor_note: Toast capture in the Playwright script returned null on both Update and Save flows — this is because the toast auto-dismisses in ~2.2s (App.jsx:83) and our network-wait timing missed the window. The toast text is wired correctly in AddVoucherSheet.jsx lines 291 ('Voucher updated') and 294 ('Saved to your wallet'). Not a product bug; visual verification by E1 if desired.
action_items: OPTIONAL: Seed a single test membership (e.g. Amazon Prime, fee 1499, benefit_rate 0.10) so the next testing iteration can finally exercise the membership-edit branch end-to-end. The Edit Membership UI path was not exercised this round due to zero membership records on the test account.

Cleanup recommendation: there are 4 vouchers on the test account including a few TEST_ prefixed duplicates from iteration 11/12 (TEST_RegB12 from this run). Optional cleanup before next major scenario testing.
critical_code_review_comments: Fix is minimal, surgical and correct. handleSave branch on isEditMode strips immutable fields (user_pin, type) before PATCH — matches backend VoucherUpdate Pydantic contract.

The key={editingVoucher?.id || 'new'} on AddVoucherSheet is a robust remount strategy that eliminates any state-bleed between edit→add transitions. The useEffect reset() fallback is also correct as belt-and-suspenders.
Owner picker prefill correctly maps editing.owner → safeValue with fallback to 'Self' when null/invalid (line 139). Verified live (current owner chip read correctly as 'owner-chip-father-in-law').
Membership edit code path is shared with voucher edit (same handleSave + same useEffect), so the fix should transparently apply once a membership record exists. No additional code changes needed.
Minor housekeeping: the eslint-disable-next-line comment at line 288 is appropriate for the user_pin/type destructure-and-discard pattern.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — both iter11 bugs verified fixed, all 3 regressions intact, membership-edit pending data seed

test_credentials: test@perkorbit.app / Perk@1234 / PIN 1234 — verified working on https://orbit-vouchers.preview.emergentagent.com
seed_data_creation: Created 1 voucher (TEST_RegB12 / TEST_iter12_v2 / ITER12V2 / ₹20) during regression-add-new test. Existing duplicates from iter 11 (Croma variants) still present on the account.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11's two bugs are now closed. Main agent is unblocked for the Redemption Tracker feature. If main agent wants 100% coverage on the membership-edit branch, they should seed a membership row first; the code path is identical to vouchers and was verified fixed. Test account still works; PIN gets reset to 'set' mode on fresh container — enter 1234 twice for setup, once for verify on subsequent runs.
rca_of_the_issue: Not applicable — both bugs already fixed by main agent before this iteration. This run only VERIFIED the fixes are correct and produced no regressions.
